basic_details.job_title: DULT Karnataka Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Associate Transport Planner, CAD Operator Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Directorate of Urban Land Transport Karnataka (DULT Karnataka)
basic_details.short_information: Directorate of Urban Land Transport Karnataka (DULT Karnataka) has published the Associate Transport Planner, CAD Operator Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 3 Associate Transport Planner, CAD Operator positions. Candidates holding a Postgraduate degree or equivalent in Transport Planning/Engineering, or a Civil Engineering degree or diploma are eligible to apply via email. The application process will remain active until 15-06-2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and application details below.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree or equivalent in Transport Planning/Engineering, Civil Engineering degree or diploma
qualification.details: Associate Transport Planner: Postgraduate degree or equivalent in Transport Planning/Engineering with 3-6 years of experience in urban transport planning, design, implementation, and research. CAD Operator: Civil Engineering degree or diploma with 3-6 years of professional experience in preparing CAD drawings for urban infrastructure projects.

salary_details.pay_scale: Associate Transport Planner: Rs.61000/- - Rs.84592/- CAD Operator: Rs.50000/- - Rs.73216/-
salary_details.details: Associate Transport Planner: Rs.61000/- - Rs.84592/- CAD Operator: Rs.50000/- - Rs.73216/-

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DULT Karnataka Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download DULT Karnataka Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DULT Karnataka recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the DULT Karnataka recruitment is 15th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Associate Transport Planner?
faq.answer: There are 2 vacancies available for the post of Associate Transport Planner in the Directorate of Urban Land Transport Karnataka.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the CAD Operator post?
faq.answer: For the CAD Operator position, candidates must possess a Civil Engineering degree or diploma along with 3-6 years of relevant professional experience.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided information, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this DULT Karnataka recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary range for an Associate Transport Planner?
faq.answer: The salary for an Associate Transport Planner ranges from Rs.61000/- to Rs.84592/- per month, depending on qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for these positions?
faq.answer: The application mode for these positions is via Email. Candidates need to send their applications to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies released by DULT Karnataka?
faq.answer: DULT Karnataka has released a total of 3 vacancies for the posts of Associate Transport Planner and CAD Operator.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these DULT Karnataka posts?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions at DULT Karnataka is contractual.

faq.question: Q9. What is the minimum experience required for the Associate Transport Planner role?
faq.answer: The minimum experience required for the Associate Transport Planner role is 3 years in urban transport planning, design, implementation, and research.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for DULT Karnataka recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article by clicking on the provided link for the Official Notification PDF.
